label: Run the generator
worldEffect: The generator runs, holding the lights and the cold against the dark.
description: The power loop's base sink (FR-SHL-03 · PL-M4-29). Burns fuel from the stash to hold world.powerGrid up — which keeps the fridge cold (stash fresh food from spoiling) and slows the carried-food clock. The one job that spends the thinnest resource to protect the others.
